programme.desc: S1 , E1477 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Sanjhbati
programme.desc: An elderly woman struggles with her difficult nature and isolated life. When a new caretaker arrives, their relationship faces challenges, developing into a story about connection and companionship.

programme.title: Sakaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E190 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Bahadur Sontan
programme.desc: Bahadur Sontan

programme.title: Cheetah
programme.desc: Jamal, a gangster, kills Amar's family. To everyone's surprise, the latter survives, wakes from a coma and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Jwar Bhata
programme.desc: Bijay, a rich tea estate owner's son, angers his father when he marries a poor girl. Ranjan, his cousin, tries to make the most of the situation by usurping his property.

programme.title: Satarupa
programme.desc: Dr. Rupa unintentionally causes Shatadal's memory loss, leading him to see her as his only kin. Later, they fall for each other but when his past returns, he forgets her.

programme.title: Agnipath
programme.desc: Sujay, Ajay and Bijay are three siblings who share a close bond and can go to any length to protect each other. However, when Sujay is killed by his own boss, Bijay sets out to exact revenge.

programme.title: Bandie
programme.desc: Unable to conceive an heir, Maharaja Brajbhan and his wife are forced to abdicate the throne for his cousin, Vikram. Chaos ensues when Vikram learns that the queen is pregnant and decides to kill her.

programme.title: Prosenjit Weds Rituparna
programme.desc: Rituparna, a fan of Prosenjit, marries a man with the same name. Her husband, who dislikes his famous namesake, falls for her and attempts to arrange a meeting between his wife and Prosenjit.

programme.title: Saheber Cutlet
programme.desc: A chef wants to open his restaurant in Paris by selling his ancestral house. However, it's not an easy task as he learns his family members are not ready to leave the house.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E502 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Veerappan
programme.desc: Veerappan, a teenager, trains under his uncle to learn to smuggle and becomes a dacoit. When the police attempts to arrest him for his activities, he plans to make an escape.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

programme.title: Panga
programme.desc: Jaya, a former Kabaddi world champion, is pushed into making a comeback into the sport by her family. However, she first has to battle her internal conflicts and the expectations society has of her.

programme.title: Gehraiyaan
programme.desc: Alisha finds her life disrupted by Zain, her cousin Tia's fiancé. Bound by a shared troubled past, their connection sparks both solace and turmoil.

programme.title: Student of the Year 2
programme.desc: Rohan follows his lover, Mridula, to St Teresa's college hoping to reunite with her. There, he befriends Manav, the most popular student, but is constantly at loggerheads with his sister, Shreya.

programme.title: Patna Shukla
programme.desc: Tanvi Shukla, a housewife, is also a minor league lawyer. Her skills are put to the ultimate test when she helps a student expose an education scam.

programme.title: Ki & Ka
programme.desc: Kia, an ambitious woman, marries Kabir, a man who prefers the role of a house husband. They enjoy their unconventional relationship until challenges such as ego clashes and jealousy set in.

programme.title: Omkara
programme.desc: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

programme.title: Lucknow Central
programme.desc: Kishen, an inmate in a Lucknow jail, yearns to be set free. When he learns that a few prisoners must form a band, he sees it as his ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Mantra
programme.desc: An Indian proprietor strives to sustain his enterprise against fierce global rivalry. Furthermore, he endeavours to compensate his family for lost time.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.
